data.title: Innoviz Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Non-Compliance Letter
data.description: On March 27, 2026, Innoviz Technologies Ltd., a top Tier-1 supplier of advanced LiDAR sensor platforms and software stacks for vehicles, shared that they received a significant update. The company, listed as NASDAQ: INVZ, based in Tel Aviv, Israel, specializes in automotive-grade technology. The news emphasizes Innoviz's prominent position in delivering high-performance LiDAR solutions.

data.title: Immersion Corporation Receives Nasdaq Staff Additional Delinquency Notice
data.description: In Aventura, Florida, Immersion Corporation (Nasdaq: IMMR), a prominent haptic technology provider, disclosed that on March 24, 2026, they were served with a delinquency notice by the Nasdaq Listing Qualifications Staff. This notice, known as the "Staff Determination Letter," was issued due to the Company's non-compliance with the filing of its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the fiscal quarter ending on January 31, 2026.

data.title: Cue Biopharma Announces CEO Transition
data.description: In an official announcement, Lucinda Warren has been named as the interim President and Chief Executive Officer following the resignation of Usman Azam. This change in leadership comes as the company navigates through a period of transition. With Warren assuming the interim role, she brings with her a wealth of experience in the industry. Azam's departure signals the end of his tenure, as the company looks ahead to a new chapter under the guidance of Warren. The transition in leadership is expected to bring about changes in the organization's direction and strategy. Warren's appointment marks a significant milestone for the company, with stakeholders eagerly anticipating the impact of her leadership. This move comes amidst a challenging time for the organization, with both internal and external factors at play. Despite Azam's departure, the company remains focused on its goals and objectives, with Warren at the helm. As the new interim President and CEO, Warren will be tasked with leading the company through this transition period and driving its growth and success. The decision to appoint Warren reflects the company's commitment to ensuring stability and continuity in its leadership. With Warren now at the helm, the company is poised to embrace new opportunities and overcome any challenges that lie ahead. Warren's appointment is set to shape the future trajectory of the organization, as it looks to capitalize on her expertise and vision. The company is optimistic about the leadership change and is confident in Warren's ability to steer the organization towards a prosperous future.

data.title: Vera Therapeutics awards grants under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the economy has grown by 3.5% in the last quarter, surpassing analysts' expectations. The unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. Additionally, the stock market has seen a significant increase, with the main index rising by 500 points. Experts believe that this strong economic performance can be attributed to increased consumer spending and a boost in manufacturing output. Overall, these indicators point towards a positive outlook for the country's economic future.

data.title: SPAR Group, Inc. Announces Timing of Fiscal 2025 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results Conference Call
data.description: SPAR Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGRP) will be revealing its financial results for the 2025 fourth quarter and fiscal year on March 31, 2026, prior to the market opening. The company, based in Charlotte, N.C., is known for its merchandising, marketing, and distribution services offered to retailers and brands in the U.S. and Canada. A conference call featuring CEO William Linnane and CFO Steve Hennen will take place at 9am ET on the same day. Interested parties can email Sandy Martin at smartin@threepa.com to submit questions for management to address during the call.

data.title: Notice of Data Breach
data.description: In Vancouver, Washington and Portland, Oregon, on March 27, 2026, Income Property Management Co. announced that they fell victim to a cybercrime. IPM clarified that there is no evidence of any data being misused or attempted to be misused.

data.title: E-Power Inc. and Raytel Electronics Announce Strategic Alliance to Launch Next-Generation 800G and 1.6T High-Speed Optical Modules for U.S. AI Data Centers
data.description: On March 27, 2026, E-Power Inc. revealed a significant strategic collaboration with Raytel Electronics to introduce cutting-edge 800G and 1.6T high-speed optical modules tailored for the North American AI infrastructure sector. E-Power, a prominent provider of AI Data Center microgrid solutions and advanced battery materials trading on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol EPOW, highlighted this partnership as a major move in the industry. This initiative signifies a strong commitment to advancing technology in the region, with a focus on meeting the demands of the growing AI market in North America.

data.title: Draft decisions of the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders to be held on 24 April 2026
data.description: The Board of Telia Lietuva, AB has put forth a draft agenda and draft decisions for the upcoming Annual General Meeting scheduled for April 24, 2026. Shareholders will convene to discuss and vote on key matters concerning the Company's operations. This pivotal meeting will address important proposals aimed at shaping the future of Telia Lietuva. Save the date to have a say in the Company's direction on the specified day.

data.title: Transform 2026 Concludes with 4,000+ Leaders Defining the Human + AI Equation
data.description: Over the course of three days, Transform highlighted main stage insights, provided hands-on learning opportunities, and revealed major announcements, establishing itself as the leading community event for leaders focused on people-oriented initiatives. This event took place in Las Vegas from March 27, 2026, and boasted significant participation numbers.

data.title: Notice of the Annual General Meeting of shareholders on 24 April 2026
data.description: The shareholders of Telia Lietuva, AB (company code: 121215434, registered at Saltoniškių str. 7 A, Vilnius, Lithuania) are invited to attend the Annual General Meeting scheduled to take place at the company's headquarters on Saltoniškių str. 7A, Vilnius, Lithuania, at 13:00 on April 24, 2026. Registration will be open from 12:00 to 12:30 for shareholders wishing to participate.
